TRICKS

1 tiles 	- Double -> http://www.nmaps.net/119667
	 	- Reverse Double
	 	- Triple

2 tiles 	- Double
	 	- Reverse Double
	 	- Triple

3 tiles 	- Double -> http://www.nmaps.net/156011
	 	- Reverse Double

4 tiles 	- Double -> http://www.nmaps.net/119964
	 	- Triple
		- WJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/120102

5 tiles		- HTCJ
		- RHTCJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/163992

3&7 tiles 	- triple

8 tiles		- Double
	 	- Reverse Double
	 	- Triple
		- WJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/124685
		- Squeeze and High Jump

Multiple Tiles:
	 	- CJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/127213
	 	- RCJ
	 	- CWJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/172705
		- CK -> http://www.nmaps.net/127213
		- Hieghtless CK
		- Vertical Corner Shove -> http://www.nmaps.net/143427
		- Horizontal CS
		- BWJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/198240
		- Low Jump -> http://www.nmaps.net/187034

Thwump 		- CK
	 	- BWJ
		- Double of horizontal returning thwump

Mines 		- Floor -> http://www.nmaps.net/124667
		- Celing -> http://www.nmaps.net/120252
		- Wall -> http://www.nmaps.net/154980
		- over 4 mines in 2 tile high space -> http://www.nmaps.net/193692
		- Wall jump between off set mines

Bounce Block 	- Double WJ
		- Triple WJ
		- Quadruple WJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/168115
		- Double Jump
		- Triple Jump
		- BBCD -> 147305
		- BBCT -> http://www.nmaps.net/182687
		- BBCK -> http://www.nmaps.net/163449
		- BWJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/153359

Oneway 		- Jump and fall/glitch through -> http://www.nmaps.net/193968
		- WJ up through ->  http://pastebin.com/rmbi52b9

Door 		- CJ ... Vertical -> http://www.nmaps.net/120055
		- RCJ ... Vertical -> http://www.nmaps.net/172095
		- CK ... Vertical
		- CJ ... Horizontal
		- RCJ ... Horizontal -> http://www.nmaps.net/217922
		- CK ... Horizontal -> http://www.nmaps.net/187086

Locked door	- CJ ... Vertical -> http://www.nmaps.net/119994
		- RCJ ... Vertical
		- CK ... Vertical
		- CJ ... Horizontal
		- RCJ ... Horizontal
		- CK ... Horizontal

Trap Door	- CJ ... Vertical
		- RCJ ... Vertical
		- CK ... Vertical
		- CJ ... Horizontal
		- RCJ ... Horizontal
		- CK ... Horizontal

Launch Pad	- Full Speed LPWJ -> http://www.nmaps.net/201428
		- Survive fall from LP on the floor
		- Angled LP + wj -> Text file in "My Maps"
		- WJ + Horrizontal LP -> http://www.nmaps.net/158645

Switches
		- Grab through horizontal Locked Door
		- Grab through Vertical Locked Door
		- Run under switches with out grabbing
Gold
		- Grab Gold Over Switches
